The '''TB-47 time bombs''' were explosives manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]], and used by several military organizations, including the armies of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They were strong enough to penetrate armor of a vehicle or [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] and deplete tight forms of infantry. TB-47s played an important role in the destruction of the [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] [[SLD-26 planetary shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] and were carried around by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] for use in boarding missions. They were also known to be used by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' {{1st}}
